# Lynx 2 Localizations

## Language support for Lynx 2 tweak

This package provides additional language localizations for Lynx 2 - the ultimate device customization tweak for iOS 14, 15 & 16.

## Features

- Multiple language support
- Community translations
- Regular updates
- Easy installation

## Requirements

- Lynx 2 must be installed
- Cephei (Aeolia) required

## Supported Languages

This package includes translations for multiple languages to make Lynx 2 accessible worldwide.

**Note:** This is a companion package for Lynx 2. Main tweak must be purchased separately.
